content_body: My only problem with the rental was that the pictures did not do it justice.  Gorgeous views from all three decks! My teenagers loved jumping in the river and then getting in the hot tub. I got up each morning, put my waders on, and hit the river for a couple hours of trout fishing, which was excellent. Caught 15-20 rainbow trout each morning. Definitely recommend the house!
title: The Pictures Don't Do It Justice
